hotel_name: Khu nghỉ dưỡng Hoàng Phúc (Hoang Phuc resort)

reviews.title: Agoda should not sell this
reviews.text:
Other comments are accurate! Use this "resort" at your all risk. The road to the guesthouse is inaccessible ( pot holes, and no lights at night) and they dont warn you; no restaurants or foods around the area cuz the guesthouse is built on an empty land that only have a few houses; the pool 
Is cloudy and very dirty; no one at the reception most of the time; nothing like the photos on Agoda; Do not rent bike from them- they gave you the shitiest by ever that you cant even use; the room is old; mosquitoes will eat you alive if you want to seat around the pool; construction in the guesthouse starts as early as possible, so it's very noisy.

reviews.title: I turned around and left
reviews.positives: It was a mess
reviews.negatives: Everything

reviews.title: A terrifying experience.
reviews.text: This is the first time I have had such a horrifying experience with a hotel on Agoda. It is too far from the center and the road leading in is very bad. I couldn't even believe when Google Maps directed me to a dirt road with a lot of potholes. When I arrived, it was raining heavily but there was no receptionist to help with the luggage, and they suggested I go in first and then carry the luggage myself afterward. I refused and went to look for another hotel, accepting the loss of the money I had paid. And I will definitely never return to this hotel, nor do I recommend anyone consider booking this place.

reviews.title: Will not come back
reviews.positives: Staff are so friendly
reviews.negatives: Too many insects in the room, bad smell. The locatoon is too isolated. Have to go off-road to reach the site. The road was too dark and scary.

reviews.title: Resort đang xây dựng
reviews.text: Resort đang xây dựng, toàn bộ hình ảnh là hình thiết kế, đường vô đang làm, khách sạn cũng đang làm, phòng có mùi mốc, không ở được.

reviews.title: A huge waste of time
reviews.positives: Cute little brown puppy!
reviews.negatives: Too many to list. It is in the middle of nowhere. No vendors not even a grocery store within a few miles at least. The booking site pictures are digitally enhanced to perfection. Masterfully fine. When we arrived it is nothing like the pictures. In the site pictures it’s beautiful! Reality is dated everywhere from the rooms to the entire outside area. Food? The site pictures are delicious beautifully cooked food displays. Reality is the manager (?) said we would eat shrimp noodles for breakfast! Haha! What we got was one two bowls of ramen soup. One had two fried eggs with chopped cabbage. The other was with fish which later made my Vietnamese gf very sick!  The room itself was too small for two people. We had one medium size and one small suitcase. There was a small armoire barely enough to hold my clothes yet alone two suitcases. Having the two suitcases yet took up more space. Asked about getting the TV to work and the manager never came. Finally got it to work and channels we wanted was in the French language. I will never ever again believe site pictures before seeing the property in person.

reviews.title: NOT HAPPY JAN!
reviews.text:
Rocked up to a construction site. With a half empty pool and rooms that looked filthy without even going into the room. 
We arrived, we saw, we left.

reviews.title: We stayed only five minute
reviews.positives: Nothing unfortunately.
reviews.negatives: The room was a haven for every vermin possible. Mosquitos visiting the room were more frequent than the staff. And we given a zapper to exterminate the mosquitos which did not work. And we had mice droppings and dead cockroaches under the bed. And the pool was a haven for mosquito lava

reviews.title: Too remote not clean
reviews.text: The facilities is deteriorating  wall and  door are not clean alot of leaves trashed in the area not clean and the road to the place is horrific.  I feel like I'm horse riding going through that road.

reviews.title: Fair distance from amenities.
reviews.positives: Property and bathroom in disrepair.

reviews.title: NO NO NO
reviews.text: NEVER

reviews.title: Very enjoyable
reviews.positives:
Fabulous pool and beach
Outdoor dining nice
Staff were super helpful

reviews.title: Tự ý huỷ đặt phòng của khách
reviews.text:
Khách sạn tự ý huỷ đặt phòng của tôi để bán cho khách khác mà tôi không nhận được bất kỳ thông báo nào.
Lý do nhắn tin cho tôi mà tôi không trả lời.. trong khi chính sách tôi đặt phòng qua Agoda không có điều khoản trên
reviews.response:
Chào anh/chị,
Chúng em có giải thích lý do và thông báo rất nhiều lần cho anh chị nhưng không nhận được phản hồi 
Sau khi anh chị chủ động liên hệ lại bên em có giải thích vấn đề chi tiết và cụ thể vì sao không thể có phòng phục vụ anh chị đuợc 
Nhưng anh chị có NGHE  nhưng ko có HIỂU 
Chúng tôi xin phép được nói rõ lại một lần cho rõ ràng: không có bất kỳ khách hàng nào trong những ngày lễ cao điểm như 30/4 và 1/5 lại đặt phòng mà không để lại thông tin liên lạc – ngoại trừ anh/chị.

Ngay sau khi nhận được đơn đặt phòng, chúng tôi đã chủ động liên hệ nhiều lần để xác nhận, nhưng hoàn toàn không nhận được bất kỳ phản hồi nào từ phía anh/chị. Trong tình huống đó, chúng tôi không thể giữ phòng một cách vô điều kiện, vì lượng khách quá đông và nhu cầu vượt xa số lượng phòng có thể đáp ứng. Và có một sự cố về kĩ thuật nội bộ nên không thể đón khách như dự kiến 

Đến hôm đó anh/chị mới đến yêu cầu nhận phòng, trong khi không xác nhận, không liên lạc, không thông báo giờ đến – và khi không c

reviews.title: Un endroit à fuir.
reviews.positives:
Pas grand chose nous sommes repartis le lendemain matin, après avoir annulé les 2 autres jours supplémentaires.
Seule, la piscine est magnifique, mais nous ne l'avons pas testée
reviews.negatives:
L'emplacement qui est loin de tout. Le minibus de Futa Line a refusé de nous y conduire. Il a fait appel à un motorbike qui a fait 2 fois le trajet pour nous y conduire sur une piste défoncée. 
Le site est situé dans une zone de travaux avec toutes sortes de déchets et détritus jonchant le sol.
Quand je suis arrivé tout était éteint. J'ai dû manifester ma présence par des cris et clameurs.

reviews.title: Sẽ không quay lại
reviews.text:
Phòng từ lúc nhận rất hôi
Giống mùi nước đái mèo…
Trải nghiệm khá tệ khi ở đây, đặc biệt là đi một mình do xa trung tâm

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Ensemble très mal entretenu et très vétusté.
reviews.negatives: L'état de la piscine ainsi que la saleté des rideaux et du sol dont certains éléments étaient cassés.le manque de personnel à  l'accueil et l'impossibilité de régler par carte bleue.

reviews.title: Not recommend
reviews.text:
This home is so far from central, and the roads is building. I can not go to there
If u live here, it also difficult to book taxi

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Travaux, spartiate, personne ne parle anglais

reviews.title: Would not stay here again
reviews.text:
Luckily we only booked this for one night. We arrived at 7pm to be told we had to give 2hrs notice if we wanted food. The guy that worked at the resort was very helpful with booking us a taxi into town and a good restaurant.  
Our room was dirty, the bathroom tikes hadnt been cleaned for a long time with lots of dirt marks on them. We found a dead lizard in our fridge, there were ants crawling all over our bed and the bathroom sink was hanging off the wall. 
There was no choice for breakfast, an egg Bahn Mi was brought to our room  which was ok. 
The pool area no longer looks like it does in the photos. 
You get what you pay for, we didn't pay a lot and you certainly don't get a lot. I would be more accepting if it was clean.

reviews.title: Expérience à ne pa renouveler
reviews.positives:
Rien ! On est très déçu les photos ne correspondent pas à la réalité c’est éloigné de tout obligé de prendre des taxis aucun service pas de bar ni restaurant dans les chambres même pas
un café et le petit déjeuner n’existe pas alors qu’on l’avait dans le prix de la chambre .
reviews.negatives: L’emplacement distance 16 kms du centre en pleine campagne  isolé de tout pas de restaurant ni bar aucun service dans les chambres salle de bain et chambre sans confort  à déconseiller

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: For the price I paid, this hotel is totally acceptable. It is green, just quite isolatedly located

reviews.title: Fatiguant
reviews.negatives: Bruit pas de volet

reviews.title: For 1 night okay
reviews.text:
Don’t expect much, for 1 night it’s okay, but longer would not be that cool, nothing around, not much food options and staff is a bit chaotic, confused, but nice and with a google translate you can manage it.

Staff is nice, especially the cook was very helpful. It’s in the middle of nowhere, far from the city and the harbor, road there is not paved, a bit harder for a cars to get there.

Pool area is very nice, jungle vibes.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Le calme et le jardin
reviews.negatives: La propreté était relative

reviews.title: Cliffys review
reviews.text: Miles away from anything .Google maps takes you to a rubbish tip and taxi driver had no idea either .everything there was a bit dated to be fair .pool pictures don't really look like the real thing

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Idéalement placé pour prendre le ferry pour les îles 3mm a pieds 
L'hôtel est pratiquement face a la mer et au milieux de stands pour manger
reviews.negatives: Le personnels est tres réservés.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Quite far from the center - bad access road - room not clean - enthusiastic staff - dirty swimming pool - a lot of mosquitoes.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Un peu loin de tout...

reviews.title: Don’t trust reviews . Agoda
reviews.text:
I have pictures some  Location a lot the swallow on the air so noise’s 
The pool is smelling bad because swallow birds shit and rats dead . 
Room smaller and no food around area.  Bad days with this booking from Agoda. 
I have video and pictures for this location .  
BAD FAKE REVIEWS

reviews.title: Publicité mensongère !!!
reviews.positives: Belle endroit, le lit est bon, personnel serviable.
reviews.negatives:
Dommage que le wifi laisse à désirer, l’assiette de noodels à 200 000dg et les infrastructures extérieures sont laissées à l’abandon… mais pour 9€ la nuit c'est correct.

Le dortoir à hirondelle est sympa, mais le haut parleur devrait donner de l’autre côté du bâtiment et non au-dessus de la piscine.

reviews.title: Nice resort, bad location
reviews.text: I booked the hotel via Agoda so I did not pay attention to the location. It is located in very remote area that the driver refused to take me there because the street is narrowed and surrounded by a cemetery. I wonder how could I ride a motorbike when I came back to the hotel late at night. That ‘s scary. . So when I was 2 km to the resort,  I decided to turn around and booked another hotel in the center of the city.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Tout etait bien sauf le scooter qui n'avait  pas de retros  et très  peu de freins,lieu  très  agréable

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: The staff at the resort are very enthusiastic. The resort area is very boring, there is nothing to entertain, and if you want to go to the center it is very far, the roads are bad and dark, making it very dangerous. If you want to go to the center for fun, you should book a taxi yourself; if you ask the resort staff to arrange it for you, the driver will take you around, so the price is higher than expected. We booked for 2 nights but only stayed for 1 night, checking out early in the morning because it was too boring.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Bien que les bungalows soient vieillissant, tout était propre et tout fonctionne.
La gentillesse du personnel.
reviews.negatives: L'hôtel est très loin de la ville et il est très compliqué de s'y rendre.

reviews.title: Further out
reviews.text:
Bit far out from everything and not much at the resort or within walking distance 
Also nestled in the middle of some bird nesting area so constant bird chirping

reviews.title: Holliday, i love you
reviews.positives: Le jardin avec piscine est magnifique de jour et encore plus de nuit. L'accueil est très sympa. Rach Giah est féerique la nuit et pleine de vie.
reviews.negatives: Au premier coup d'oeil c'est un peu juste côté propreté dans la chambre. L'équipement est sommaire pour le tarif.

reviews.title: The room is fine but it's difficult to move around.
reviews.text: The accommodation or facilities are somewhat acceptable, but the road is too difficult and far from the center. It's also hard to relax because the pool has a lot of mosquitoes and there are no entertainment services available.

reviews.title: AUF KEINEN FALL!!!
reviews.positives: nichts, es war eine Katastrophe!!
reviews.negatives:
Achtung: auf keinen Fall auf die Bilder verlassen. Die „Anlage“ ist komplett heruntergekommen, es wird nicht geputzt, es erfolgt kein Wechsel der Bettwäsche, kein Austausch der angetrunkenen Flaschen. Darüber hinaus findet sich überall Dreck, Mäusekot, Haare, alte Schokolade, Schimmel und einige lebendige tierische Mitbewohner. Wir haben das Zimmer 2x gewechselt - es wurde jedoch statt besser nur noch schlimmer. 

Das Personal ist absolut unfähig. Sie sprechen kein einziges Wort englisch, es ist unmöglich zu kommunizieren. Auch per Translator keine Chance. 

Außerdem liegt das Hotel sehr abseits, sodass uns fast kein Taxifahrer dorthin bringen wollte. 

Wir sind sofort wieder abgereist und haben uns ein neues Hotel gesucht.

reviews.title: Handy but a bit out of the way
reviews.text:
Nice pool
Nice room
Ok good
Worked for us cycling and getting the ferry next day
Not a lot around there to do
Pepsi the dog is a highlight

reviews.title: Katastrophal
reviews.negatives: Kein Restaurant, Baustelle, Lärm am Abend, Nacht und in der Früh. Total abgelegen

reviews.title: Homestay
reviews.text: The room rates are cheap, there is a swimming pool but there are still fallen leaves in the pool, the bathroom floor is sinking and the tiles are cracked, the road to get there is a bit far from the center and in bad condition.

reviews.title: Grundsätzlich sehr nette Anlage, wenn kein privates Event dort stattfindet
reviews.positives: Tolle Anlage, alles grün , der Pool ist super
reviews.negatives:
Bei der Ankunft wurde uns mitgeteilt das der Pool ab 16.00 Uhr für eine private Gesellschaft geschlossen ist. 
Ab 16.00 Uhr waren Lautsprecher Boxen so laut am Pool dass wir uns tatsächlich nicht mehr unterhalten konnten. Unser Bungalow war 5 m vom Pool
Zimmerservice gab es dann auch keinen mehr für uns.
Und als wir dann in die Stadt gefahren sind wurde vergessen dass wir noch weg sind und die Anlage war abgesperrt.
Wir mussten durch lautes Rufen auf und aufmerksam machen.
Alles in allem eine unglückliche Kombi

reviews.title: Not suggesting for solo travelers
reviews.text: As it is far from city

reviews.title: Für eine Nacht war es ok,wenn man einen Roller hat.
reviews.positives: Der Garten mit Palmen und anderen Bäumen um den Pool herum. Rollervermietung vor Ort.
reviews.negatives:
Leider keine Auflagen auf den Holzliegen.
Bad ziemlich schimmelig .Entfernung zum Ort ist etwas weit.

reviews.title: If you want peace and quiet, come here.
reviews.text:
It is truly quiet. It is located apart from the already peaceful urban area. No noise, no hustle and bustle, no rush; here the 24-hour day flows slowly like the thin smoke from a cigarette. 

The greenery fills every path. And the mosquitoes have become my companions; perhaps my flesh is very tasty. And the toilet couldn't be flushed, and that day I had to hold it in.

And not to mention, the road crosses through a cemetery that is under construction. Follow the directions at the rest area and don’t trust Google Maps at this time, and remember to stop by the resort really early, and prepare enough food and drinks.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Wird gerade neu gestaltet.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: A campus with many trees, cool, suitable for organizing outdoor barbecues in the evening, ideal for family and friends.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Un po da risistemare....e la poca pulizia con molte zanzare..

reviews.title: Serene
reviews.text: Love the peace and quiet of the plac.e

reviews.title: Slecht
reviews.positives: Niets
reviews.negatives: Locatie. Zwembad werd verbouwd (dec 2025). Kamers stonken. We zijn direct weg gegaan.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The hotel is quite far from the center. I arrived at 9 AM, and the road is very bad, with very few people on both sides. There are no shops or restaurants around, so I recommend it for those who like peace and quiet. If you're coming by motorbike, it's better to come during the day.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Het zwembad was prima. Verder was het hotel vergane glorie. Kamers zagen er smoezelig uit. Alles was oud en versleten. Dit is geen aanrader. Het ligt aan een onverharde weg vol hobbels en kuilen.
reviews.negatives: De kamer. De locatie. Het eten.

reviews.title: Very good.
reviews.text: I am very satisfied with the service and staff, but the road is a bit bad.
reviews.response:
Kính chào Quý khách,

Cảm ơn Quý khách đã lựa chọn Resort Hoàng Phúc và dành thời gian chia sẻ đánh giá của mình.

Chúng tôi rất vui mừng khi biết rằng Quý khách hài lòng với dịch vụ và đội ngũ nhân viên tại resort. Đây chính là động lực để chúng tôi không ngừng nỗ lực, mang đến những trải nghiệm tốt nhất cho Quý khách.

Chúng tôi cũng xin ghi nhận và thấu hiểu sự bất tiện về đường đi. Đây là vấn đề chúng tôi luôn quan tâm và hy vọng rằng trong tương lai, khi Quý khách quay lại, mọi điều kiện sẽ hoàn thiện hơn.

Rất mong được đón tiếp Quý khách trong những dịp sắp tới!

Trân trọng,
Ken
Quản lý
Resort Hoàng Phúc

reviews.title: Lag afgelegen, geen andere horeca of restaurants in de buurt
reviews.positives: De aanplant en zwembad
reviews.negatives: De ligging (De route er naar toe).

reviews.title: Peaceful
reviews.text: I went to Rach Gia from Saigon looking for clean air and a slower pace. It’s a bit out of town but easy to town if you like. I checked in and found out that I was the only quest. I was treated very kindly. With the greenery and the birds singing you can easily close your eyes and think you’re in the jungle. I did see a 4’ snake 🐍 I will be going back next month for 8 nights then in January for 75 nights if all works out

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Wegens storm op zee onverwacht hier terecht gekomen en 2 nachten verbleven.
Zeer gezellig, rustig plekje met fijne behulpzame mensen. Fijn zwembad en lekker eten.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Vị trí hơi xa trung tâm, còn lại rất tuyệt. Phục vụ tận tình. Không gian đẹp và trong lành

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Hoàn toàn khác với mô tả, vị trí xa thành phố, đi lại rất khó và ở nơi hẻo lánh ít dân cư, tiện ích hoàn toàn thất vọng, không thể gọi là khu Resort như quảng cáo

reviews.title: Go ahead.
reviews.text: With that price. For me, it is a good resort. Everything is to my liking. Suggested improvement: there should be a mirror in the room for when changing clothes (having it would enhance the experience, but if not, that's okay too).

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Kg có gì thích cả
reviews.negatives: Dơ quá kg đáng đồng tiền trên hệ thống booking là 800.000 vnd nhưng resot thì thu 880.000vnd tôi thật sự rất thất vọng về chổ nghĩ này.kg xứng đáng nếu tốt nhất booking kg nên cho khách ở chỗ này rất dể mất khách

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Good staff, large room,  quite far the center

reviews.title: Cực kuf thất vọng
reviews.negatives: Địa quá tệ chổ nghỉ không sạch sẻ máy lạnh hư nhân viên kêu dùng quạt

reviews.title: Value for money.
reviews.text: Great service.

reviews.positives: Nhân viên thân thiện, giường rộng thoải mái
reviews.negatives: Phòng xuống cấp, bị hôi, nhiều muỗi. Hồ bơi muốn bơi phải liên hệ trước khi tới

reviews.title: Không gian yên tĩnh
reviews.text: Thích hợp không gian yên tĩnh để nghỉ ngơi, bơi xả stress.

reviews.title: Giá rẻ bù lại, 5/10
reviews.positives: Nhân viên thân thiện, hỗ trợ nhiệt tình
reviews.negatives: Phòng xuống cấp, bị hôi, đường đi khó khăn, nhiều muỗi

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Very good service

reviews.title: tạm được
reviews.positives: nhân viên nhiệt tình túc trực phòng đối diện hồ không khí trong lành tổng quan ok
reviews.negatives: đường đi sỏi đá hơi khó chạy đường vắng cách xa trung tâm , khách sạn nuôi yến nên kêu ngày đêm, có nước nóng nhưng k sử dụng dc ở dơ luôn, hi vong sk nâng cấp lại phòng vệ sinh ống dẩn nước bồn cầu bị rò rỉ chảy nước

reviews.title: Nhức đầu với tiếng chim yến
reviews.text: Tiếng ồn phát ra từ nhà nuôi yến rất khó chịu, tiếng kêu phát ra suốt ngày đêm.

reviews.title: KẾT LUẬN CHUNG: NẾU CÓ LƯU TRÚ TẠI CẦN THƠ THÌ MÌNH SẼ 50/50 QUAY LẠI ĐÂY
reviews.positives:
Mình lưu trú tại đây 1 đêm để tham gia một kì thi, mình ở lại cùng mẹ và có một số nhận xét như sau:
1. Địa điểm: gần khu vực trung tâm, gần các khu ăn uống như phố ẩm thực Bún Xáng, bờ kè mạc thiên tích, trường đại học cần thơ, vincom xuân khánh,...
2. Nhân viên: lễ tân và các chú bảo vệ nhiệt tình
3. Cơ sở hạ tầng: ở mức tương đối, không quá cũ nhưng cũng không quá mới, nhà vệ sinh sạch sẽ và có cửa kính riêng khi tắm nên hạn chế được trơn trượt khá tốt.
reviews.negatives:
1. THANG MÁY KHÔNG ĐI ĐƯỢC XUỐNG TẦNG HẦM, CHỈ DỪNG ĐƯỢC Ở TẦNG 1 VÀ MÌNH PHẢI TỰ ĐI BỘ XUỐNG HẦM
2. tuy nhiên ở lễ tân không có nhân viên trực thường xuyên, khi mình check out phòng thì không gặp ai

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The clean room is really nice, and the staff are very helpful, but the road to get there is a bit quiet because they are doing construction. When I first drove in, I felt a bit nervous about the road, but I decided to stay and try it out. The room is suitable for those who like to chill and enjoy a quiet atmosphere. I give it a score of 9.5/10 (because the road is a bit empty when coming back in the evening).

reviews.title: Tạm ổn
reviews.positives: Yên tỉnh
reviews.negatives:
Khó di chuyển đến các địa điểm khác nếu không có xe riêng.
Dịch vụ ăn uống tại resort gần như không có, rất không tiện.

reviews.title: Suitable for families with young children.

reviews.title: Cheap price for high quality facility
reviews.text: If you compare this price range, you will find it very worthy paying for the room. The owner is very friendly and supportive for my stay. Location is perfect for whom wanna no stress vacation. I am allowed to cook and do laundry for free with my room rate. Renting a motorbike to go around island at cheap prices which let you explore tourist spots and restaurants. Distance to the beach is comfortable to walk. Walking and jogging by the beach is an amazing experience for me. I prefer less crowded spot like here  in order to exercise in the morning along the wide well-built road and the nearby nice sandy beach. Compared to the beach in the center, I find it greatly spacious and closer to the nature. If you want to release stress, it is the best spot to stay in Phu Quoc island. Nightlife can be approach by motorbike easily. The photos are real as uploaded by the owner and this resort is newly built and the owner cleans very well so no worries LOL

reviews.negatives: Không có

reviews.title: Médiocre et signalement
reviews.text:
Réservation effectuée et payée pour deux bungalows identiques vue piscine, tels que présentés sur l’annonce (photos et descriptif contractuels). À l’arrivée, l’établissement n’était pas en mesure de fournir la prestation réservée : un seul bungalow conforme disponible, l’autre remplacé par une chambre différente, non équivalente, non sécurisée pour un enfant et infestée de moustiques.
Cela constitue une non-conformité manifeste du service et une inexécution contractuelle. J’ai demandé soit la fourniture des deux bungalows réservés, soit un remboursement (y compris en proposant de prendre les frais de plateforme à ma charge), ce qui a été refusé. La seule alternative proposée était un changement de chambre le lendemain, inacceptable puisque la réservation portait sur deux nuits simultanées dans deux bungalows identiques.
Nous avons donc dû quitter les lieux immédiatement, à nos frais, et réserver un autre hôtel. À ce jour, aucune solution satisfaisante n’a été apportée par Agoda malgré signalement.
Je précise également que l’emplacement réel ne correspond pas à la présentation en ligne (accès difficile, environnement dégradé) et que la piscine était trouble.
En conséquence, je signale officiellement un défaut de conformité, publicité trompeuse et prestation non fournie, et demande un remboursement intégral conformément aux obligations de fourniture du service réservé.
Je ne recommande pas cet établissement.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: К сожалению, во время нашего приезда бассейн решили переделать и плитку рядом. Когда сделают - будет отличное место . Также по крыше бегали крысы внутри. Иногда мешало и пугало . Но хозяйка очень милая, приветливая

reviews.title: Oasis de paix
reviews.text:
À l'écart d'une ville peu attrayante, bord de mer sans plage, au bout d'un chemin chaotique, un nid de verdure avec piscine et jardin soigné. 
Un pavillon avec salle de bain, très large lit, baie vitrée, A/C petit frigo, bouilloire électrique. 
Chant des oiseaux, des grenouilles  comme bruit de fond.... pour un prix dérisoire de 9 euros. On peut supporter quelques imperfections dues à la vétusté. 
Venu pour une nuit, chaque jour je repousse le départ d'une nuit ou deux.  Très bien pour une retraite de méditation et de yoga.

reviews.title: Идеально для отдыха от города.
reviews.positives:
Кондиционер в номере. Горячая вода. Чистое постельное. Удобная кровать. Полотенца. Холодильник в номере. Больше всего понравилось пение птиц, тишина и окружение растительности. Милая маленькая собачка понравилась тоже:)
Есть скутер в аренду. Дешево. 
Напитки в номере: виски за отдельную плату. Вода бесплатно. Можно заказать покушать. Есть неплохое меню с приемлемыми ценами. Правда, мы не пробовали ее.
Место расположено достаточно близко от порта. Есть две дороги: одна на данный момент на реконструкции, поэтому по ней небезопасно ездить, так что проверяйте маршрут перед выездом.
reviews.negatives: Не очень чистые полы в номере и бассейн тоже хотелось видеть свежее.

reviews.title: Retraite de tranquillité
reviews.text:
Un pavillon isolé, air conditionné, salle de bain, frigo et surtout une piscine devant la porte. Un joli jardin, palmiers, cocotiers. Oasis de verdure éloigné de la ville. 
Venu pour une nuit, je suis resté trois jours...

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
Wir hatten berechtigte Gründe, warum wir die lange Anreise leider mit Sicherheitsrisiko abbrechen müssten. Dies wurde dem Ressort mitgeteilt. Trotzdem hat der Ressortbetreiber das Geld für sich behalten und auf AGB verwiesen, was unverständlich und inakzeptabel war. Denn er hatte unendlich viel Zeit , das freie Hotelzimmer weiterzuvermieten. Das ist schon Betrug mit hinterhältiger Taktik, eigenartig über die Sicherheitsbedürfnisse des Kunden ohne Rücksicht auf den Goodwill seines Unternehmens. Die Chance hatte er, unseren Vorschlag zur Beibehaltung der hälftigen Zahlung anzunehmen, ignoriert. Ausserdem hatte er auf unsere Bitte, Agoda über diesen  Vorgang und ggf. Teilerstattung zu informieren bzw. uns die Möglichkeit zur Kontaktaufnahme zu ermöglichen.  Das zeugt die typische Arroganz der geschäftlichen Gier auf Kosten der anderen sowie Inkompetenz als Ressort / Hotel-Anbieter. Daher soll dieser Unternehmer geahndet und die Erlaubnis entzogen werden.
Die Zahlung über Euro 21 ca. für Nichtstun ist schon traurig für den Tourismus, was Vietnam dringend braucht und diese Vertrauenslust kann sich das Land nicht leisten.

reviews.title: Absteige und wirklich ekelhaft!
reviews.text: Es ist super dreckig und eigentlich zum Abreißen die Bungalow's. Es wird nichts saubergemacht ( bis auf die Bettwäsche), sonst hätten wir im stehen geschlafen. Ja und alles klebt und rostet, flecken überall. Der Vermieter war nett. Ist sehr abgelegen. Der Garten ist noch einigermaßen nett. Aber die Fotos sind wohl uralt… wir waren nir aus not hier. Immerhin war es billig, aber nie wieder!

reviews.title: Not as represented

reviews.negatives: The room was so tiny no bedside table or lamp , no t.p or place big enough to eat off , the pool was toxic shade of green a sink in the bathroom made for a 2 year old did not look very clean.  I was not happy with this accomidation.

reviews.title: Schöne Unterkunft, Abzocke vom Personal
reviews.text:
2 Tage übernachtet. Die Unterkunft ist schön und vor allem sehr grün. Der Pool ist zwar etwas milchig, aber das stört nicht wirklich. 

Leider wurden wir gebeten, am Check out Tag extra Leistungen zu zahlen, mit denen wir nicht einverstanden waren. 

Early check in fee - 100k Dong. Wir sind um 6 Uhr morgens angekommen - das Personal hat uns nicht informiert, dass es so etwas gibt. Wir haben den Schlüssel bekommen und waren froh, so früh das Zimmer schon zu bekommen. Wir dachten, wie nett - aber am Ende kam die Rechnung dafür. Etwas unpassend ohne Kommunikation. 

Haben uns 2 extra Handtücher für den Pool genommen, die wir am Ende in der Sonne gelassen haben, damit die trocknen. Weil die Anlage nicht sehr sauber ist und die Liegen aus älterem Holz sind, die bei den weißen Handtüchern Flecken hinterlassen, wurde versucht, uns 200k Dong für die verschmutzten Handtücher zu kassieren. 

Als wir das nicht zahlen wollten, wurden weitere Gründe gesucht, Geld zu kassieren. 

Wir hatten dort einen Roller ausgeliehen, der im relativ schlechten Zustand war - den ersten, den wir bekommen haben, hatte kein Licht und die Blinker funktionierten nicht. Zum Glück haben wir den Roller einen Tag vorher abgegeben und den Reisepass zurück bekommen. Bin mir sonst sicher, das Personal würde uns mit dem Reisepass erpressen. 

Die Unterkunft ist schön, der Inhaber sollte aber unserer Meinung nach die Richtlinien überdenken oder das Personal schulen, damit richtig umzugehen.

reviews.title: Extremely relaxing and comfortable.
reviews.positives: It’s really surprising to find a resort with such an incredibly affordable price, surrounded by nature, with plenty of greenery, shade, and a swimming pool. I truly love staying here—the atmosphere is so fresh and relaxing, making it a perfect place to unwind after exhausting days.
reviews.negatives: Due to the dense greenery, there are some insects, which I don’t really like. However, I still feel comfortable and find my experience here absolutely wonderful.

reviews.text: Lâu lâu muốn yên tĩnh cũng nên đi ở đây, có điều mình hơi sợ côn trùng,  cây cối nhiều thì sẽ có mấy con đó, nghỉ dưỡng thì rất ok ổn

reviews.title: Good place to stay in rach gia
reviews.text: The hotel was good, very comfortable bed, a beautiful garden and nice dinner. The swimmingpool was not very clean, so that's something to improve. 15 minutes by taxi from tge harbour. Overall experience: good.

reviews.title: Hezký resort
reviews.text: Hezký resort, super ochotný personál, jejich angličtina nic moc, ale domluvit se nějak lze. Jen to místo, je to uprostřed zatím ničeho, ale jednou tam bude zástavba.

reviews.title: OK. But a little rundown!
reviews.text: Nice staff. Good facilities. Reasonably clean. (But the sweet puppy had left a small blob on the floor in my room🙂). Good value for money!
